page_content:
**Subject:** Shadowing Inquiry: Current ICU Volunteer & BME/MSCS Student  
Dear Dr. [Last Name],  
I am currently serving as an **ICU Volunteer at Medical City Frisco** and am writing to inquire if I might shadow you for 1–2 shifts this month.  
I recently graduated **Cum Laude** from UNT with a degree in **Biomedical Engineering (3.638 GPA)** and am currently completing my **Master’s in Computer Science (Machine Learning) at Georgia Tech**. My goal is to become a physician who bridges the gap between clinical practice and advanced technology, such as the **soft-robotics research** I co-published during my undergraduate years.  
In addition to my volunteer work, I work 25–30 hours a week as a **Pharmacy Technician**, where I manage medication therapy and insurance adjudication. Having logged over **100 hours in the ICU environment**, I am fully HIPAA-compliant and familiar with high-acuity clinical workflows.  
I would greatly value the opportunity to observe your clinical decision-making. I’ve attached my **CV** (Healthcare/Tech version) for your review.  
Respectfully,  
Arian Moridani  
806-340-4502  
[Your UNT or Georgia Tech Email]
